item.dc:creator: clodivs

item.title: I lost my best friend yesterday
item.description: I can’t sleep. My brother went to the hospital almost a month ago, said he was having chest pains and some other stuff. Long story short… there were problems with his heart and he had heart surgery yesterday. They repaired the valves and all was going great… until it was time for the heart to pump on its own and it couldn’t. He was my baby brother. My heart hurts so so much right now.
item.dc:creator: toxicXsquid

item.title: It's possible after all!
item.description: Not even from work! Edit: For those asking, I started hanging out at a local board game cafe (food, beer, and games!) Which grew into a d&d group which resulted in hanging out in regular life

item.title: To share with educators. Because it may save lives.

item.dc:creator: Philfrackin

item.title: Electric city bus fast charging at station. Nantes, France
item.dc:creator: GrouthKnockOut

item.title: deranged anti-Semitic guy going on rant against an interracial couple
item.description: The couple was a Chinese/Vietnamese man and his fiance who is a white woman. Ten minutes prior to this recording the racist guy screamed at them from across the street about how he hates mixed couples and used all the slurs he could think of. When the racist then followed them down this street like a fucking weirdo, the guy took out his phone to start recording. This took place in Texas. Why the racist guy brought up Jews, no one knows. A police report was filed after the incident. Dogs really are man's best friend. You can report an antisemitic, bias or discriminatory incident through here among other places: https://www.adl.org/report-incident
item.dc:creator: RepairsGrowTails
